title: Damage Indicator YS
description: Adds a clean red bossbar health display for the entity you’re looking at, with readable damage, healing, and health feedback.
body:
# Damage Indicator YS

## Focus Mode Design

Damage Indicator YS is designed as a low-clutter alternative to floating health text datapacks.

Instead of showing health above every nearby entity, it only displays information for the entity you are actively looking at. This keeps the screen cleaner while still giving useful combat feedback.

## Features

- Clean red bossbar health indicator
- Shows the entity name and HP
- Displays recent damage as `Damaged -X`
- Displays recent healing as `Healed +X`
- Briefly shows 0 HP when a tracked entity dies
- Multiplayer-friendly per-player bossbar system
- Optional player targeting, disabled by default
- No resource pack required

## Commands

Use these commands after installing or reloading the datapack:

```mcfunction
/function dmi:systems/info
/function dmi:systems/install
/function dmi:systems/refresh
/function dmi:systems/repair
/function dmi:systems/uninstall
```
## Roadmap

Version 1.0 focuses on the clean bossbar-based display.

Future updates may expand the datapack with more optional display modes, better configuration controls, combat memory tracking, and additional server-friendly customization.
## Support

If you enjoy the datapack and want to support future Minecraft projects from ManaMage and Yazsras Studios, donation links are available on the project page.
